label: SEDC Rebuild - Simulator
info: SEDC transformer monitoring rebuild. Generates dummy 3-phase energy meter telemetry for 3 virtual transformers in Khartoum / Omdurman / Khartoum North, decodes it faithfully using the original Energy Readings logic, and pushes JSON updates over WebSocket at /ws/transformers for the React dashboard.

name: SEDC Simulator (3 transformers)
Energy Readings (Decoder)
Format for WebSocket
SEDC Rebuild - Simulator Flow
info:
Pipeline:

[Inject every 5s]
   -> [SEDC Simulator]
        Generates one 3-element JSON array per transformer (3 devices).
        Same shape as the original SEDC MQTT payload (gts_energy topic).
   -> [Energy Readings (Decoder)]
        Faithful rebuild of original SEDC decoder. Unpacks 24-element DATA
        array, computes averages, checks alarms.
   -> [Format for WebSocket]
        Reshapes for the React dashboard.
   -> [WS /ws/transformers]
        Pushed live to ws://<host>:1880/ws/transformers

Configure 3 devices via the tab's env var 'Devices'.
